text.content: Join MAXAM at the ReMA Convention for 2026!

rich_text.plain_text: Join MAXAM at the ReMA Convention for 2026!

text.content: Location - Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino, Las Vegas, NV

rich_text.plain_text: Location - Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino, Las Vegas, NV

text.content:
The largest recycled materials industry event in the world is heading back to Vegas! ReMA 2026 is taking over Mandalay Bay and bringing together close to 7,000 industry professionals. For four days the recycling community will come together to sharpen their skills, gain knowledge, build relationships, grow their businesses, and celebrate each other.

MAXAM will be showcasing our solid OTR tires and products suited for the recycled materials industry. See a sneak peek below and be sure to come witness it in person too.

text.content: We'll be at booth #2359 - see you there!
